key_features_implemented: Google Maps Integration (Maps JS, Places Autocomplete, Directions API)
True full-city coverage for any address in Hyderabad

Premium Sidebar UI with glassmorphism and smooth tab transitions
Dynamic Journey Timeline strip rendering transit legs
HydraPass Apple Wallet-style ticket generation with animated QR and holographic shine
Pass type selection (Single, Day, Weekly, Monthly)
Eco-credits model with daily caps, streaks, and cooldowns
Simulated BLE beacon radar for coach crowding
next_steps: User testing and review of the v3 premium UI
